name: Creamy Pepper Pasta

ingredients.item: torn fresh basil or chopped parsley for garnish.

method: Boil salted water for pasta and add penne. In the meantime, in a large frying pan on medium heat, brown chopped onion and red pepper flakes in 2 T butter and 1 T olive oil. Add roasted peppers and stir. Add garlic and heavy cream. Mix on low heat until thick and bubbly. Drain penne and add to cream sauce. Manticare well. Top with a roasted pepper and grated parmesan. Serves 2-3. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Olé
